# --- Web framework & server ---
fastapi==0.138.0
uvicorn==0.48.0
python-multipart==0.0.32        # Required by FastAPI for File/UploadFile

# --- AWS SDK ---
boto3==1.43.19
# botocore is installed automatically as a boto3 dependency

# --- PDF / OCR processing ---
PyMuPDF==1.27.2.3               # imported as `fitz` in K1_1041_extraction.py
pdf2image==1.17.0               # used in Form1040/main_1040.py

# --- Rate limiting ---
ratelimit==2.2.1
